pages.text: Smelting, blasting, smoking, and campfire recipes use the recipe's current cooking time. Each craft spends that amount from both the matching timed reserve and Fuel, so datapack changes to cooking time are reflected automatically.

Furnace supplies Smelting, Blast Furnace supplies Blasting, Smoker supplies Smoking, and Campfire supplies Campfire Cooking. Brewing Stand can accumulate Brewing energy, but brewing execution is not currently available.

Crafting Table, Stonecutter, and exact Smithing Transform recipes need their matching Instant Station but spend no process energy. Built-in axe stripping, scraping, and wax removal need Axe Energy instead.

An $(thing)unsupported recipe$() shows a neutral message rather than guessing. Special or context-dependent recipes, Smithing Trim, arbitrary modded block axe actions, and brewing execution are not available. When a supported preview is ready, ingredients, resources, and output room are all checked before crafting.
